extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each entity. I counted only the “Against” rows: criminal proceedings are Nil for the Company, Directors, Promoters and Subsidiaries; statutory/regulatory proceedings are 4 against the Company and Nil against the other listed entities; tax proceedings are 1 against the Company and Nil against Subsidiaries, excluding the separate promoter and director tax rows and all “By” rows. The aggregate quantified amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is ₹9.00 million against the Company, with the Subsidiaries’ amount shown as NA; this converts to ₹0.90 crore (₹9.00 million ÷ 10). Contingent liabilities are explicitly stated as Nil as at June 30, 2024, so the consolidated total is ₹0.00 crore; the separate ₹87.69 million commitment is not a contingent liability. The disclosed concentration percentages relate to West Bengal, B2B/B2C segments, suppliers or other segments rather than company-wide top-five/top-ten customers, so customer concentration fields are null; the source tables use ₹ million, converted to crore at 10 million per crore.
